debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)
d : ℕ
h𝓒 : IsNIPWith d ↑𝓒
⊢ IsNIPWith d ↑(@SetFamily.restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent α 𝓒)

  refine Set.image_congr fun A _ ↦ ?_

  exact disjoint_sdiff_left

intro s hs h
  let f : _ ↪ α := ⟨Subtype.val, Subtype.val_injective⟩
  refine h𝓒 (s.map f) (by simp [hs]) fun t' ht' ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩, hAt⟩ := h (s.filter fun x ↦ x.1 ∈ t') (filter_subset _ _)
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  ext x
  simp only [mem_inter, mem_coe, mem_map, mem_filter, exists_prop, and_assoc]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨hxA, y, hys, rfl⟩
    have : y ∈ _ ↓∩ (A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) := by
      rw [Set.mem_preimage, mem_symmDiff]
      exact ⟨or_iff_not_imp_right.2 fun _ ↦ hxA, fun h ↦ (y.2.2 h).elim⟩
    exact (mem_filter.1 (hAt ▸ mem_inter.2 ⟨this, hys⟩)).2
  · intro hxt'
    obtain ⟨y, hys, rfl⟩ := mem_map.1 (ht' hxt')
    refine ⟨?_, y, hys, rfl⟩
    have : y ∈ _ ↓∩ (A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) :=
      (mem_inter.1 (hAt.symm ▸ mem_filter.2 ⟨hys, hxt'⟩)).1
    rw [Set.mem_preimage, mem_symmDiff] at this
    exact this.resolve_right fun h ↦ (y.2.2 h).elim

classical
  intro s hs
  rw [← Finset.card_map ⟨Subtype.val, Subtype.val_injective⟩]
  refine h𝓒 _ fun t ht ↦ ?_
  let I : Set α := ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
  let f : _ ↪ α := ⟨Subtype.val, Subtype.val_injective⟩
  let u := t ∆ (s.map f).filter (· ∈ I)
  have hu : u ⊆ s.map f :=
    (symmDiff_subset_union _ _).trans <| union_subset ht <| filter_subset _ _
  let v := s.filter (fun x ↦ f x ∈ u)
  have hv : v ⊆ s := filter_subset _ _
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩, hAv⟩ := hs v hv
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  ext x
  simp only [mem_inter, mem_map, Function.Embedding.coeFn_mk, exists_exists_and_eq_and]
  by_cases hx : x ∈ s.map f
  · obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := hx
    simp only [hx, true_and]
    have h_eq : y ∈ (Subtype.val ⁻¹' (A ∆ I) : Set _) ∩ s ↔ y ∈ v := by rw [hAv]
    simp only [mem_inter, mem_preimage, mem_filter, hy, true_and] at h_eq
    have h_u : f y ∈ u ↔ f y ∈ t ∆ I := by
      simp [mem_symmDiff, mem_filter, hx]
    rw [h_u, mem_symmDiff, mem_symmDiff] at h_eq
    tauto
  · have : x ∉ t := mt (ht ·) hx
    simp [this, hx]

intro S hS h
  let f := Function.Embedding.subtype (fun x ↦ x ∈ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A)
  apply h𝓒 (S.map f) (by simp [hS])
  intro T hT
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩, h_eq⟩ := h (T.preimage f <| by simpa using hT) (by simp)
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  ext x
  simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_map, exists_prop] at hT ⊢
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
    rw [← Finset.mem_preimage, ← h_eq, Finset.mem_filter] at hy
    have := (Set.mem_diff _).1 y.2
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_symmDiff, this.2, not_false_eq_true,
      and_true, or_false, true_and] at hy
    exact ⟨⟨y, hy.1, rfl⟩, hy.2⟩
  · rintro ⟨⟨y, hy, rfl⟩, hxA⟩
    refine ⟨y, ?_, rfl⟩
    rw [← Finset.mem_preimage, ← h_eq, Finset.mem_filter]
    have := (Set.mem_diff _).1 y.2
    simp only [hy, true_and, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_symmDiff, this.2,
      not_false_eq_true, and_true, or_false, hxA]

rintro S hS h
  refine h𝓒 (S.map (Function.Embedding.subtype _)) (by simpa using hS) fun T hT ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨T, hT, rfl⟩ := Finset.subset_map_iff.1 hT
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩, h⟩ := h T hT
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  ext x
  simp only [mem_inter, Finset.mem_map, Function.Embedding.subtype_apply, exists_eq_right]
  by_cases hx : x ∈ S.map (Function.Embedding.subtype _)
  · obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := Finset.mem_map.1 hx
    rw [← h]
    simp only [mem_inter, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_symmDiff, (y.2).2, iff_false,
      not_false_iff, true_iff, hy, and_true]
  · simp only [hx, and_false, iff_false]
    exact fun h ↦ hx (Finset.map_subset_map.2 hT h)

intro K hK h
  let ι : ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A) ↪ α := Function.Embedding.subtype _
  apply h𝓒 (K.map ι) (by simp [hK])
  intro Y hY
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩, hA'⟩ := h (K.filter (ι · ∈ Y)) (filter_subset _ _)
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  ext x
  simp only [mem_inter, and_congr_left_iff, mem_map, Function.Embedding.subtype_apply]
  rintro ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩
  have : x ∉ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := (Set.mem_diff _).1 k.2
  replace hA' := (ext_iff.1 hA') k
  simp only [hk, mem_inter, mem_filter, Set.mem_preimage, Function.Embedding.subtype_apply, true_and] at hA'
  rw [← hA', mem_symmDiff_iff]
  tauto

simp only [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent, coe_image, Set.image_comp]
  intro s hsfin hscard hshat
  rw [← Set.ncard_image_of_injective _ Subtype.val_injective hsfin] at hscard
  refine h𝓒 (Subtype.val '' s) (hsfin.image _) hscard fun t ht ↦ ?_
  let I := ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
  let t' := t ∆ (I ∩ Subtype.val '' s)
  have ht' : t' ⊆ Subtype.val '' s :=
    (symmDiff_subset_union _ _).trans (Set.union_subset ht (Set.inter_subset_right ..))
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩, h⟩ := hshat (Subtype.val ⁻¹' t') (by simpa using ht')
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  rw [← symmDiff_right_inj (I ∩ Subtype.val '' s), ← rfl, Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_right,
    ← Set.image_inter Subtype.val_injective, ← Set.preimage_inter, h]
  simp only [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, t']
  rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left ht']

classical
  rintro S hS_card hS_shattered
  let S' := S.map (Function.Embedding.subtype _)
  have hS'_card : S'.card = d := by rw [Finset.card_map, hS_card]
  apply h𝓒 S' hS'_card
  intro T hT
  let T_sub := S.filter (·.1 ∈ T)
  obtain ⟨A_res, hA_res, h_eq⟩ := hShattered T_sub (Finset.filter_subset _ _)
  rw [mem_coe, restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent, mem_image] at hA_res
  obtain ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩ := hA_res
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  ext x
  by_cases hx : x ∈ S'
  · obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := Finset.mem_map.1 hx
    simp only [Finset.mem_inter, hx, true_and]
    have : y ∈ A_res ∩ S ↔ y.1 ∈ A := by
      simp only [Finset.mem_inter, hy, true_and, Set.mem_preimage, Subtype.val_eq_coe]
      have : y.1 ∉ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := (Set.mem_diff _).1 y.2 |>.2
      simp [Set.mem_symmDiff, this]
    rw [← this, h_eq, Finset.mem_filter]
    simp [hy]
  · simp only [Finset.mem_inter, hx, false_and]
    exact fun h => hx (hT h)

intro s hs
  rw [← Finset.card_map (Function.Embedding.subtype _)]
  refine h𝓒 _ fun t ht ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩ := Finset.subset_map_iff.1 ht
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩, hAs⟩ := hs t ht
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩

  simp only [Finset.mem_inter, Finset.mem_map, Function.Embedding.coe_subtype, exists_eq_right]

    rw [← hAs, Finset.mem_inter]
    refine ⟨hys, ?_⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_symmDiff, Set.mem_iInter, mem_coe]
    have : y.val ∉ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := fun h ↦ y.2.2 h
    tauto
  · rintro ⟨y, hyt, rfl⟩
    rw [← hAs, Finset.mem_inter] at hyt
    refine ⟨?_, y, hyt.1, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_symmDiff, Set.mem_iInter, mem_coe] at hyt
    have : y.val ∉ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := fun h ↦ y.2.2 h

rw [IsNIPWith] at h𝓒 ⊢
  intro S hS
  rw [← card_map ⟨Subtype.val, Subtype.val_injective⟩]
  refine h𝓒 _ fun T hT ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨T₀, hT₀, rfl⟩ := subset_map_iff.1 hT
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩, h_eq⟩ := hS T₀ hT₀
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  ext x
  simp only [mem_inter, mem_map, exists_prop, exists_eq_right]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨y, hyS, rfl, hyA⟩
    refine ⟨y, ?_, rfl⟩
    rw [← h_eq, mem_filter]
    have := y.2
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iInter, not_forall] at this
    exact ⟨hyS, by simpa [symmDiff_def, this.2]⟩
  · rintro ⟨y, hyT, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨y, hT₀ hyT, rfl, ?_⟩
    rw [← h_eq, mem_filter] at hyT
    have := hyT.2
    have hy_prop := y.2
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iInter, not_forall] at hy_prop
    simpa [symmDiff_def, hy_prop.2] using this
